name: Fire Bolt
summary: A ranged attack cantrip that deals fire damage and scales with character level.

name: Vicious Mockery
summary: A cutting insult that deals psychic damage and hinders the target's next attack.

name: Sacred Flame
summary: A radiant cantrip that forces a saving throw instead of a spell attack roll.

name: Druidcraft
summary: A primal utility cantrip for small natural omens and minor sensory effects.

name: Produce Flame
summary: A flame-bearing cantrip that can light the area or be hurled as a short-range fire attack.

name: Guidance
summary: A support cantrip that boosts a future check with a small divine bonus.

name: Resistance
summary: A defensive cantrip that helps a target endure one upcoming saving throw.
effect: The target adds 1d4 to one saving throw made before the spell ends

name: Mage Hand
summary: A utility cantrip that creates a spectral hand for simple remote manipulation.

name: Shillelagh
summary: A weapon-buff cantrip that turns a club or quarterstaff into a stronger spellcasting-based melee option.
effect: A club or quarterstaff uses your spellcasting ability for attacks and deals 1d8 damage

name: Thorn Whip
summary: A vine-like lash cantrip that pulls a creature closer when the spell attack hits.

name: Eldritch Blast
summary: A force cantrip that fires a ranged beam and scales into multiple blasts with level.

name: Light
summary: A utility cantrip that causes an object to emit bright light for an extended period.

name: Minor Illusion
summary: A flexible illusion cantrip that creates a short-lived sound or simple image for trickery and misdirection.
effect: Create a sound or a small image that lasts for the duration unless inspected or recast

name: Ray of Frost
summary: A cold cantrip that slows a target while dealing reliable ranged damage.
effect: On a hit, the target's Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn

name: Chill Touch
summary: A grave-cold melee spell attack that deals necrotic damage and briefly stops healing.
effect: On a hit, the target can't regain Hit Points until the end of your next turn

name: Magic Missile
summary: A dependable arcane spell that creates force darts which do not rely on an attack roll.

name: Mage Armor
summary: A defensive spell that sets a stronger baseline AC for an unarmored target.
effect: Base AC becomes 13 + Dexterity modifier while unarmored

name: Burning Hands
summary: A close-range cone of fire that punishes clustered enemies immediately.
effect: Loose flammable objects in the cone start burning

name: Cure Wounds
summary: A staple restorative spell that heals a creature through divine or primal magic.

name: Healing Word
summary: A fast healing spell that restores a smaller amount of hit points at range.

name: Guiding Bolt
summary: A ranged radiant spell attack that also helps the next allied attack land.

name: Bless
summary: A concentration spell that increases allies' attack rolls and saving throws.

name: Detect Magic
summary: A ritual-friendly utility spell for sensing the presence of magic nearby.

name: Disguise Self
summary: An infiltration spell that changes the caster's apparent appearance for an hour.
effect: Your appearance changes within the limits of your normal body plan until the spell ends

name: Animal Friendship
summary: A charm spell that can calm a Beast and make it less likely to turn hostile.

name: Charm Person
summary: A social-control spell that charms one Humanoid and briefly makes it friendly to the caster.
effect: On a failed save, the target is Charmed and Friendly to you until the spell ends or it is harmed

name: Command
summary: A forceful word of authority that compels a creature to obey a brief single-word order.

name: Entangle
summary: A ground-control spell that restrains creatures in grasping plants until they break free.

name: Faerie Fire
summary: A revealing glow that outlines creatures and makes it easier for allies to land attacks.
effect: Outlined targets cannot benefit from invisibility, and attacks against them gain advantage

name: Fog Cloud
summary: A wide obscuring cloud that blocks vision and reshapes the battlefield.

name: Goodberry
summary: A survival-friendly spell that creates healing berries with a full-day duration.
healing: Up to 10 berries that each restore 1 hit point

name: Heroism
summary: A courage-boosting enchantment that grants steady temporary hit points while concentration holds.
effect: The target becomes immune to being frightened and gains temporary hit points each turn

name: Speak with Animals
summary: A ritual-friendly utility spell that lets the caster communicate simple ideas with Beasts.

name: Sleep
summary: An arcane control spell that can knock weaker creatures unconscious.

name: Hex
summary: A curse that adds extra damage to attacks and hampers one chosen ability.

name: Hunter's Mark
summary: A tracking-focused mark that boosts weapon pressure against one chosen target.

name: Shield of Faith
summary: A protective ward that boosts a creature's Armor Class while concentration holds.
effect: +2 bonus to Armor Class

name: Misty Step
summary: A short-range teleport that provides rapid repositioning as a bonus action.

name: Hold Person
summary: A strong single-target control spell that paralyzes a Humanoid until it breaks free.
effect: On a failed save, one Humanoid is Paralyzed until it repeats the save successfully

name: Invisibility
summary: A stealth staple that grants the Invisible condition until the target attacks, damages, or casts.
effect: The target has the Invisible condition until it attacks, deals damage, or casts a spell

name: Mirror Image
summary: A defensive illusion that creates decoys to intercept incoming attacks.
effect: Three illusory duplicates can cause attacks that hit you to destroy an image instead

name: Aid
summary: A durable support spell that raises both current and maximum hit points for multiple allies.
effect: Choose up to three creatures to increase their current and maximum hit points by 5

name: Lesser Restoration
summary: A dependable restorative spell that ends one common debuff on a touched creature.
effect: End one condition such as blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned

name: Moonbeam
summary: A radiant column that punishes creatures standing in the light each round.

name: Pass without Trace
summary: A stealth-favoring ward that helps the whole group move quietly through dangerous ground.
effect: Creatures you choose gain a +10 bonus to Stealth checks and leave less obvious tracks

name: Call Lightning
summary: A persistent storm spell that repeatedly punishes clustered foes with lightning from above.

name: Counterspell
summary: A fast defensive reaction that can break another caster's spell before it takes effect.
effect: A creature casting a spell within range makes a Constitution save or its spell dissipates with no effect

name: Dispel Magic
summary: A universal answer spell that ends ongoing magic on a creature, object, or magical effect.
effect: End one qualifying ongoing spell on a creature, object, or magical effect, with a check for stronger magic

name: Fireball
summary: An iconic explosive blast that hits a wide area for heavy fire damage at long range.

name: Fly
summary: A movement spell that grants a willing target strong aerial mobility for a full encounter.
effect: A willing creature gains a Fly Speed of 60 feet and can hover until the spell ends

name: Hypnotic Pattern
summary: A powerful control spell that can freeze a crowd in place if they fail a Wisdom save.
effect: Creatures in the area that fail the save are Charmed, Incapacitated, and reduced to Speed 0

name: Plant Growth
summary: A terrain-control and world-utility spell that can either choke movement or enrich a large region.
effect: Choose either dense overgrowth that quadruples movement cost in the area or a long-term crop-enrichment effect

name: Revivify
summary: A critical recovery spell that brings back a recently slain creature with 1 Hit Point.
effect: A creature that died within the last minute returns to life with 1 Hit Point

name: Spirit Guardians
summary: A defining cleric aura that slows nearby enemies and grinds them down each round.

name: Create Food and Water
summary: A dependable survival spell that produces enough food and water to sustain a group.
effect: Create 45 pounds of food and 30 gallons of fresh water within range

name: Daylight
summary: A long-duration light spell that floods an area with sunlight and suppresses weaker magical darkness.
effect: Bright sunlight fills a large area or emanates from an object and can dispel weaker magical darkness

name: Magic Circle
summary: A warding spell that locks out selected supernatural creature types and weakens them around the circle.
effect: A cylinder ward interferes with Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, or Undead and makes them less dangerous near the circle

name: Meld into Stone
summary: A ritual-friendly hiding spell that lets the caster merge into stone for hours of concealment.
effect: You merge into a stone surface with your gear until you leave it or the stone is badly damaged

name: Nondetection
summary: A protective concealment spell that hides a creature, object, or place from divination magic.
effect: A touched target cannot be targeted by Divination spells or perceived through magical scrying sensors

name: Remove Curse
summary: A touch-range cleansing spell that ends curses on a creature or object.
effect: End curses affecting one creature or object, or break attunement to a cursed magic item

name: Sending
summary: A long-range communication spell that carries a short message across any distance.
effect: Send a 25-word message to a known target and receive an immediate reply

name: Speak with Plants
summary: A nature utility spell that lets you question plants and reshape plant-based terrain for a short time.
effect: Nearby plants can communicate, answer simple questions, and alter plant-based terrain in the area

name: Water Walk
summary: A ritual-friendly travel spell that lets a group cross dangerous liquid surfaces as if they were solid ground.
effect: Up to ten willing creatures can move across liquids such as water, mud, snow, or lava as if on solid ground

name: Wind Wall
summary: A battlefield-control wall that blocks projectiles, disperses gases, and batters creatures on contact.

name: Aura of Life
summary: A protective aura that resists necrotic harm and helps nearby allies stay standing.
effect: Allies in the aura gain resistance to Necrotic damage, and a creature at 0 Hit Points can regain 1 Hit Point at the start of its turn there

name: Banishment
summary: A battlefield exile spell that removes a creature and can permanently send extraplanar foes away.
effect: On a failed Charisma save, the target disappears to a harmless demiplane for the duration and some extraplanar creatures may not return

name: Charm Monster
summary: A broad charm spell that can be used to befriend almost any creature on a failed save.
effect: On a failed Wisdom save, the target is Charmed until the spell ends or it is harmed by you or your allies

name: Conjure Woodland Beings
summary: A hazardous nature-spirit emanation that punishes nearby enemies and helps you slip away.
effect: Nature spirits fill a 10-foot Emanation that can deal 5d8 Force damage on a failed Wisdom save, and you can Disengage as a Bonus Action

name: Death Ward
summary: A long-duration safeguard that keeps a creature from falling to death the first time disaster strikes.
effect: The next time the target would drop to 0 Hit Points, it drops to 1 instead, or an instant-death effect is negated

name: Dimension Door
summary: A long-range teleport that instantly carries you and an ally to a distant location.
effect: Teleport yourself up to 500 feet and optionally bring one willing creature standing within 5 feet of you

name: Freedom of Movement
summary: A mobility ward that defeats restraints, difficult terrain, and magical movement suppression.
effect: The target ignores Difficult Terrain, resists magical movement reduction, gains a Swim Speed, and can slip free of nonmagical restraints

name: Greater Invisibility
summary: An upgraded invisibility spell that lets the target stay unseen even while fighting or casting.
effect: A touched creature remains Invisible for the duration without the spell ending when it attacks or casts spells

name: Locate Creature
summary: A tracking divination that points you toward a known creature or the nearest creature of a chosen kind.
effect: Sense the direction and movement of a familiar creature or the nearest creature of a known kind within 1,000 feet

name: Polymorph
summary: A transformative control spell that turns a creature into a Beast form with a replacement stat block.
effect: Transform a creature into a Beast form; unwilling targets resist with a Wisdom save

name: Stoneskin
summary: A durable ward that hardens flesh against common weapon injuries for an extended fight.
effect: A willing creature gains resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage

name: Blight
summary: A necrotic withering blast that devastates living targets and instantly kills ordinary plants.
effect: A creature takes 8d8 Necrotic damage on a failed Constitution save, and nonmagical plants wither immediately

name: Confusion
summary: A chaotic mind-warping enchantment that leaves a cluster of creatures disoriented and unpredictable.
effect: Creatures in a 10-foot-radius Sphere act unpredictably and lose Bonus Actions and Reactions on a failed Wisdom save

name: Control Water
summary: A large-scale terrain spell that floods, parts, redirects, or spins a huge volume of water.
effect: Control water in a 100-foot cube with flood, part water, redirect flow, or whirlpool effects

name: Divination
summary: A ritual consultation that asks divine powers one question about events likely to occur soon.
effect: Ask a deity or its servants one question about a goal, event, or activity within 7 days

name: Dominate Beast
summary: A domination spell that charms a Beast and lets you direct it telepathically.
effect: On a failed Wisdom save, a Beast is Charmed and obeys telepathic commands

name: Guardian of Faith
summary: A persistent spectral sentinel that punishes enemies who approach its protected space.
effect: A spectral guardian damages nearby enemies with a Dexterity save until it has dealt 60 total damage

name: Hallucinatory Terrain
summary: A wide-area illusion that disguises natural terrain as something far more misleading or dangerous.
effect: Make a 150-foot cube of natural terrain look, sound, and smell like different terrain for 24 hours

name: Ice Storm
summary: A brutal hailstorm that batters an area with mixed bludgeoning and cold damage while leaving slick ground.
effect: A 20-foot-radius Cylinder deals bludgeoning and cold damage on a Dexterity save and leaves Difficult Terrain

name: Otiluke's Resilient Sphere
summary: A force bubble that isolates a creature or object behind an almost untouchable barrier.
effect: Enclose a Large or smaller creature or object in a weightless, damage-immune sphere on a failed Dexterity save

name: Wall of Fire
summary: A blazing barrier that scorches creatures where it appears and threatens anything lingering nearby.
effect: Create a long wall or ring of fire that deals 5d8 Fire damage when it appears and punishes creatures near one side

name: Arcane Eye
summary: An invisible scouting sensor that floats ahead and feeds you remote vision in every direction.
effect: Create an invisible invulnerable eye that relays vision and can move 30 feet as a Bonus Action

name: Compulsion
summary: A charm-driven control spell that forces enemies to march in a chosen direction.
effect: On a failed Wisdom save, creatures are Charmed and must spend their movement heading in a direction you choose

name: Conjure Minor Elementals
summary: Elemental spirits whirl around you, empowering your attacks and hindering nearby foes.
effect: A 15-foot Emanation grants your attacks extra elemental damage and creates Difficult Terrain for enemies

name: Evard's Black Tentacles
summary: Writhing tentacles seize an area, restraining creatures and crushing them with force.
effect: Tentacles fill a 20-foot square with Difficult Terrain and restrain creatures that fail a Strength save

name: Fire Shield
summary: A protective aura of flame or frost punishes melee attackers and grants elemental resistance.
effect: Choose a warm or chill shield to gain damage resistance and deal 2d8 Fire or Cold damage to nearby melee attackers

name: Giant Insect
summary: A summoned giant insect ally fights beside you with a form-specific stat block.
effect: Summon a giant centipede, spider, or wasp ally that obeys your commands and scales with slot level

name: Mordenkainen's Faithful Hound
summary: A hidden phantom watchdog guards an area, barks at intruders, and bites enemies with force.
effect: A hidden hound watches an area for hours, alarms on intruders, and bites nearby enemies for force damage

name: Phantasmal Killer
summary: A nightmare illusion terrorizes a creature with recurring psychic harm and lingering impairment.
effect: A creature takes Psychic damage on a failed Wisdom save and suffers Disadvantage until it saves again

name: Stone Shape
summary: A precise transmutation that sculpts stone into doors, passages, barriers, or crafted forms.
effect: Reshape a Medium stone object or a 5-foot section of stone into a new form

name: Vitriolic Sphere
summary: A globe of acid erupts across a wide area, dealing an immediate blast and a lingering burn.
effect: A 20-foot-radius Sphere deals 10d4 Acid damage on a failed Dexterity save plus 5d4 more at the end of the target's next turn

name: Fabricate
summary: A long-form transmutation that converts raw materials into finished nonmagical products.
effect: Convert visible raw materials into finished objects of the same material, within size and skill limits

name: Leomund's Secret Chest
summary: A hidden extraplanar storage spell that hides a chest on the Ethereal Plane until recalled.
effect: Hide a chest and its contents on the Ethereal Plane and recall it later by touching its replica

name: Mordenkainen's Private Sanctum
summary: A warded secure zone that blocks sight, sound, divination, teleportation, and planar travel.
effect: Ward a Cube against sound, vision, divination, teleportation, and planar travel, with permanent upkeep potential

name: Bigby's Hand
summary: A giant magical hand batters, shoves, grapples, or shields at your command.
effect: Create a Large magical hand that can strike, push, grapple, or interpose as a Bonus Action

name: Cone of Cold
summary: A freezing blast devastates a wide cone and can leave victims frozen solid.
effect: A 60-foot Cone deals 8d8 Cold damage on a Constitution save

name: Greater Restoration
summary: A powerful restorative touch removes curses, petrification, exhaustion, and other deep impairments.
effect: Remove one major debilitating effect such as Exhaustion, Petrified, a curse, or a reduction to an ability score or Hit Point maximum

name: Hold Monster
summary: A paralyzing enchantment locks down a creature until it can shake off the magic.
effect: On a failed Wisdom save, a creature is Paralyzed for the duration and repeats the save at the end of each turn

name: Mass Cure Wounds
summary: A burst of healing energy restores multiple allies at once across a large area.
effect: Up to six creatures in a 30-foot-radius Sphere regain 5d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier Hit Points

name: Raise Dead
summary: A costly resurrection spell that restores a recently dead creature to life.
effect: Revive a creature dead no longer than 10 days with 1 Hit Point and neutralize poisons that affected it at death

name: Scrying
summary: A remote divination sensor watches a creature or location after a modified Wisdom save.
effect: Create an invisible sensor near a creature or seen location, with the target's Wisdom save modified by knowledge and physical connection

name: Teleportation Circle
summary: A sigil-linked portal carries travelers to a permanent circle you know.
effect: Create a short-lived portal to a permanent teleportation circle whose sigil sequence you know

name: Wall of Force
summary: An invisible force barrier blocks movement, damage, and even ethereal travel.
effect: Create an invisible wall, dome, or globe of force that nothing can physically pass through

name: Wall of Stone
summary: A solid stone barrier reshapes the battlefield and can become permanent if maintained.
effect: Create ten panels of solid stone that can enclose areas, bridge gaps, and become permanent if maintained

name: Commune
summary: Ask a deity or divine proxy a small set of direct questions and receive truthful answers.
effect: Ask a deity or divine proxy up to three yes-or-no questions before the spell ends

name: Commune with Nature
summary: Nature spirits reveal key facts about the surrounding region, from portals to powerful threats.
effect: Learn three facts about the nearby natural area, such as settlements, portals, creatures, terrain resources, or water

name: Contact Other Plane
summary: Risk a mind-breaking communion with an extraplanar intelligence to ask difficult questions.
effect: Contact an extraplanar intelligence to ask up to five questions, risking 6d6 Psychic damage and Incapacitated on a failed Intelligence save

name: Dispel Evil and Good
summary: Ward yourself against outsiders, break certain enchantments, or dismiss a nearby extraplanar foe.
effect: Protect yourself from several creature types, break certain possessions or fear/charm effects, or dismiss a nearby outsider

name: Dominate Person
summary: Seize a humanoid mind, issue telepathic orders, and maintain control while the spell lasts.
effect: On a failed Wisdom save, charm a Humanoid and command it telepathically for the duration

name: Geas
summary: Bind a creature to a long-term command and punish open defiance with psychic agony.
effect: On a failed Wisdom save, charm a creature with a long-term command that deals 5d10 Psychic damage when defied

name: Legend Lore
summary: Learn significant lore about a famous person, place, or object from the world itself.
effect: Learn significant lore about a famous person, place, or object

name: Planar Binding
summary: Compel a Celestial, Elemental, Fey, or Fiend to serve you for an extended duration.
effect: On a failed Charisma save, bind a Celestial, Elemental, Fey, or Fiend to serve you for 24 hours or longer

name: Rary’s Telepathic Bond
summary: Forge a long-range telepathic link among a whole group of willing allies.
effect: Forge an hour-long telepathic link among up to eight willing creatures on the same plane

name: Tree Stride
summary: Step through living trees to cross a wooded battlefield or forest in an instant.
effect: Move from one living tree to another of the same kind within 500 feet once on each of your turns

name: Animate Objects
summary: Animate a cluster of objects into a temporary allied construct swarm under your command.
effect: Animate several unattended objects into allied Constructs you can command with a Bonus Action

name: Cloudkill
summary: A drifting poison fog chokes an area and punishes anything trapped inside it.
effect: A drifting 20-foot-radius Sphere deals 5d8 Poison damage on a Constitution save and heavily obscures the area

name: Conjure Elemental
summary: Conjure an elemental spirit that restrains nearby foes in punishing elemental force.
effect: Conjure a Large elemental spirit that can restrain nearby creatures and deal 8d8 elemental damage on a Dexterity save

name: Contagion
summary: A malignant touch inflicts necrotic sickness, poison, and lingering saving-throw weakness.
effect: A touched creature takes 11d8 Necrotic damage on a failed Constitution save and can remain Poisoned for 7 days

name: Dream
summary: Send a messenger into a target's dreams to converse or deliver a terrifying psychic warning.
effect: Enter a known target's dreams to converse or deliver a terrifying ten-word message that can deny rest and deal 3d6 Psychic damage

name: Flame Strike
summary: A pillar of sacred fire crashes down, mixing searing flame with divine radiance.
effect: A 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder deals 5d6 Fire and 5d6 Radiant damage on a Dexterity save

name: Insect Plague
summary: A churning swarm of locusts obscures an area and tears through anything trapped within it.
effect: A 20-foot-radius swarm deals 4d10 Piercing damage on a Constitution save, lightly obscures the area, and creates Difficult Terrain

name: Mislead
summary: Turn invisible while a convincing illusory double moves and performs in your place.
effect: Become Invisible while an illusory double appears, moves, speaks, and can serve as your remote senses

name: Seeming
summary: Wrap a whole group in long-lasting illusions that alter their bodies and gear.
effect: Give creatures within range illusory appearances that can alter body shape, gear, and apparent size for 8 hours

name: Telekinesis
summary: Move creatures and objects by force of thought, suspending or wrenching them through the air.
effect: Move creatures or objects by thought, potentially Restraining a creature on a failed Strength save

name: Antilife Shell
summary: A living barrier surrounds you and keeps most creatures from crossing into reach.
effect: A 10-foot Emanation prevents most creatures from passing or reaching through it

name: Awaken
summary: Grant a beast or plant true intellect, speech, and temporary supernatural goodwill.
effect: Raise a Beast or Plant to Intelligence 10, grant speech, and Charm it for 30 days unless harmed

name: Creation
summary: Pull shadowstuff into the world and shape it into a temporary object of matter you know.
effect: Create a temporary object of vegetable or mineral matter up to a 5-foot Cube from shadow material

name: Hallow
summary: Consecrate a large area with a lasting ward and bind a powerful supernatural effect to it.
effect: Consecrate an area with a lasting ward against chosen creature types and one bound extra effect

name: Modify Memory
summary: Charm a creature, incapacitate it, and rewrite or erase part of its recent memories.
effect: On a failed Wisdom save, charm and incapacitate a creature while you alter or erase a memory

name: Passwall
summary: Open a temporary passage through solid construction without destabilizing the structure.
effect: Open a temporary passage through wood, plaster, or stone up to 20 feet deep

name: Reincarnate
summary: Restore a dead humanoid to life in a newly formed body of another playable species.
effect: Form a new body for a dead Humanoid and return its soul to life in a new species

name: Summon Dragon
summary: Call a draconic spirit to fight beside you with claws, breath, flight, and shared resistance.
effect: Summon a Draconic Spirit ally that fights on your initiative, grants you resistance, and scales with slot level

name: Blade Barrier
summary: Raise a wall of magical blades that shreds and hinders creatures trying to cross it.
effect: Create a long wall or ring of magical blades that grants cover, becomes difficult terrain, and deals 6d10 Force damage to creatures in or moving through it

name: Chain Lightning
summary: Hurl a lightning bolt that forks into multiple nearby targets for heavy crackling damage.
effect: Strike one target and arc up to three more bolts to nearby creatures or objects for 10d8 Lightning damage

name: Disintegrate
summary: Fire a devastating green ray that erases creatures, objects, and magical force.
effect: Launch a ray that deals 10d6 + 40 Force damage and can reduce creatures, objects, or force creations to dust

name: Globe of Invulnerability
summary: Surround yourself with a shimmering anti-magic barrier that blanks lesser spells.
effect: Create a 10-foot Emanation that blocks spells of level 5 or lower cast from outside the barrier

name: Heal
summary: Flood a creature with restorative energy for a major burst of healing and condition recovery.
effect: Restore 70 Hit Points and end the Blinded, Deafened, and Poisoned conditions on a creature

name: Heroes' Feast
summary: Conjure a grand feast that fortifies allies against fear and poison and bolsters their vitality.
effect: Create a feast for up to twelve creatures that grants poison resistance, fear and poison immunity, and bonus hit points for 24 hours

name: Mass Suggestion
summary: Implant a plausible command into many minds at once and steer their behavior for hours or longer.
effect: On a failed Wisdom save, up to twelve creatures follow a short suggestion for up to 24 hours unless harmed

name: Sunbeam
summary: Project a recurring line of searing sunlight that burns foes and leaves them dazzled.
effect: Launch a 60-foot line of sunlight that deals 6d8 Radiant damage, can blind, and can be fired again each turn

name: True Seeing
summary: Grant a creature supernatural sight that pierces illusions and hidden truths.
effect: Give a willing creature Truesight out to 120 feet for 1 hour

name: Wall of Ice
summary: Shape a massive icy barrier that freezes on impact and punishes anything that breaks through it.
effect: Create a dome, globe, or paneled wall of ice that deals Cold damage when formed and leaves a frigid damaging breach when broken

name: Eyebite
summary: Turn your gaze into a repeating curse that can panic, sicken, or drop targets unconscious.
effect: Force a creature within 60 feet to fall asleep, panic, or sicken, and retarget the gaze on later turns

name: Find the Path
summary: Sense the most direct physical route to a known destination for hours or even a full day.
effect: Sense the distance, direction, and most direct physical route to a familiar destination on the same plane

name: Flesh to Stone
summary: Lock a creature in place and grind it toward petrification through repeated failed saves.
effect: Restrain a creature and force repeated Constitution saves that can turn it to stone

name: Forbiddance
summary: Seal a large sanctified area against teleportation, planar travel, and unwanted creature types.
effect: Ward a huge area against teleportation and planar entry, and damage chosen creature types that cross it

name: Harm
summary: Unleash withering necrotic power that ravages a target and slashes its maximum hit points.
effect: Deal 14d6 Necrotic damage and reduce the target's Hit Point maximum by the damage taken

name: Move Earth
summary: Slowly reshape a wide stretch of terrain into trenches, berms, walls, or pillars.
effect: Reshape a large area of dirt, sand, or clay over time into trenches, walls, pillars, or raised ground

name: Transport via Plants
summary: Open a living passage between two large plants anywhere on the same plane.
effect: Create a magical link between two large inanimate plants so creatures can step through one and emerge from the other

name: Wall of Thorns
summary: Raise a dense bramble barrier that tears at creatures when it appears and when they force through it.
effect: Create a thorn wall that blocks line of sight, slows movement, and deals 7d8 Piercing or Slashing damage

name: Wind Walk
summary: Turn a whole group into swift cloud forms for long-distance travel and safe descent.
effect: Transform yourself and up to ten willing creatures into fast-moving cloud forms with flight and damage resistance

name: Word of Recall
summary: Teleport yourself and nearby allies back to a prepared sanctuary in an instant.
effect: Teleport yourself and up to five willing creatures to a previously prepared sanctuary

name: Circle of Death
summary: Unleash a massive wave of negative energy that scours a wide area with necrotic force.
effect: Burst a 60-foot-radius Sphere with negative energy for 8d8 Necrotic damage

name: Conjure Fey
summary: Call a fey spirit that lashes minds, spreads fear, and blinks around the battlefield.
effect: Summon a fey spirit that makes a melee spell attack for 3d12 Psychic damage and can teleport before attacking again

name: Contingency
summary: Bind a prepared self-targeting spell to a trigger so it springs into effect automatically.
effect: Store a self-targeting level 5 or lower spell and define the trigger that releases it automatically

name: Create Undead
summary: Raise controlled undead servants from humanoid corpses and renew your command over them nightly.
effect: At night, animate up to three humanoid corpses as Ghouls and maintain command over them for 24 hours

name: Guards and Wards
summary: Layer a stronghold with fog, locks, webs, illusions, and one extra magical trap effect.
effect: Ward a large area with fogged corridors, locked doors, webbed stairs, and a chosen extra spell effect

name: Magic Jar
summary: Store your soul in a vessel, then attempt to possess another humanoid body.
effect: Project your soul into a container and attempt to possess a humanoid body within 100 feet

name: Planar Ally
summary: Call on a powerful extraplanar patron to send a celestial, elemental, or fiendish helper.
effect: Beseech a cosmic power to send a Celestial, Elemental, or Fiend that may bargain for service

name: Programmed Illusion
summary: Create a hidden scripted illusion that activates when a chosen trigger is met.
effect: Set an illusion up to a 30-foot Cube to perform a scripted five-minute scene when a trigger occurs

name: Delayed Blast Fireball
summary: Condense a growing bead of fire that erupts into a devastating delayed blast.
effect: Suspend a glowing bead that explodes in a 20-foot-radius Sphere for at least 12d6 Fire damage when released

name: Etherealness
summary: Step into the Border Ethereal to drift unseen through the world for hours.
effect: Step into the Border Ethereal for up to 8 hours and optionally bring extra willing creatures with a higher slot

name: Finger of Death
summary: Unleash killing necrotic energy that can raise its humanoid victim as a zombie.
effect: Blast one creature with negative energy for 7d8 + 30 Necrotic damage and raise a slain Humanoid as a Zombie

name: Fire Storm
summary: Shape a contiguous storm of fire cubes that engulfs a large battlefield.
effect: Arrange up to ten contiguous 10-foot Cubes of fire that deal 7d10 Fire damage

name: Forcecage
summary: Seal a target area inside an invisible prison of force that resists escape and dispelling.
effect: Create an invisible force cage or box that traps creatures and blocks most escape

name: Plane Shift
summary: Transport linked allies across planes or to a known planar teleportation circle.
effect: Transport yourself and up to eight linked willing creatures to another plane of existence

name: Regenerate
summary: Restore a creature, sustain its recovery for an hour, and regrow severed body parts.
effect: Restore 4d8 + 15 Hit Points, then keep healing the target each turn while limbs regrow

name: Resurrection
summary: Return a dead creature to full life and restore its body, at a steep cost to both of you.
effect: Revive a creature dead up to a century with full Hit Points and restored body parts

name: Reverse Gravity
summary: Invert gravity in a towering cylinder and fling creatures and objects upward.
effect: Reverse gravity in a 50-foot-radius, 100-foot-high Cylinder and send creatures upward

name: Teleport
summary: Instantly transport allies or an object to a known destination on the same plane.
effect: Teleport yourself and up to eight willing creatures or one object to a familiar destination

name: Conjure Celestial
summary: Call down a moving pillar of celestial light that heals allies or sears foes.
effect: Create a moving pillar of Upper Planes light that heals chosen creatures or deals 6d12 Radiant damage

name: Divine Word
summary: Speak a word of Upper Planes power that weakens or destroys creatures by their remaining vitality.
effect: Utter a divine word that inflicts escalating HP-threshold effects and can banish extraplanar creatures

name: Mirage Arcane
summary: Remake a vast landscape into an illusory terrain that looks, feels, and functions like something else.
effect: Transform up to 1 mile square of terrain into a convincing illusory landscape that can impede movement

name: Mordenkainen?s Magnificent Mansion
summary: Conjure an extradimensional mansion with a banquet, many rooms, and a silent staff of servants.
effect: Open a shimmering door to an extradimensional mansion with furnished rooms, food, and 100 servants

name: Mordenkainen?s Sword
summary: Manifest a hovering spectral sword that repeatedly strikes nearby targets with force.
effect: Create a spectral sword that makes repeated melee spell attacks for 4d12 plus modifier Force damage

name: Prismatic Spray
summary: Blast a cone of eight possible colored rays with wildly different elemental and disruptive effects.
effect: Flash eight possible rays in a 60-foot Cone, rolling randomly to determine each target effect

name: Project Image
summary: Create a distant illusory double that you can see and hear through while directing its performance.
effect: Create a distant illusory copy of yourself that you can perceive through and direct

name: Sequester
summary: Hide an object or willing creature from sight, divination, and time until the spell ends.
effect: Magically conceal an object or willing creature in invisibility and suspended animation until a condition ends the spell

name: Simulacrum
summary: Shape a loyal snow-and-ice duplicate of a beast or humanoid into a long-term servant.
effect: Create a friendly simulacrum duplicate from ice or snow that obeys your commands

name: Symbol
summary: Inscribe a nearly invisible trigger glyph that unleashes one of several devastating magical effects.
effect: Inscribe a hidden harmful glyph with a chosen trigger and one of six major effects

name: Animal Shapes
summary: Transform willing allies into beasts so a group can adapt to travel, combat, or infiltration on the fly.
effect: Transform willing creatures into Large or smaller beasts of CR 4 or lower and grant temporary hit points based on the chosen form

name: Antimagic Field
summary: Wrap yourself in an antimagic aura that suppresses spells, magic items, teleportation, and planar travel.
effect: Create a 10-foot antimagic aura that suppresses spells, magic items, teleportation, and planar travel

name: Control Weather
summary: Seize the sky and steadily shift precipitation, temperature, and wind across a massive outdoor area.
effect: Alter precipitation, temperature, and wind within 5 miles, shifting conditions over time

name: Dominate Monster
summary: Charm and telepathically command nearly any creature, overriding its choices while the spell lasts.
effect: Charm a creature and issue telepathic commands while the two of you remain on the same plane

name: Earthquake
summary: Rend the ground into dangerous difficult terrain that topples creatures and tears open fissures.
effect: Shake a 100-foot-radius area into difficult terrain, knocking creatures prone and opening fissures

name: Holy Aura
summary: Radiate a powerful divine ward that protects allies and blinds fiends or undead who strike them.
effect: Emit a 30-foot aura that boosts allies' saves, hinders attackers, and can blind fiends or undead

name: Incendiary Cloud
summary: Unleash a rolling cloud of smoke and embers that obscures the field and scorches anyone caught inside.
effect: Create a mobile 20-foot-radius cloud of smoke and embers that heavily obscures and deals 10d8 Fire damage

name: Maze
summary: Trap a creature in a labyrinthine demiplane until it solves its way out or the spell ends.
effect: Banish a creature into a maze-like demiplane until it escapes with a Study check or the spell ends

name: Power Word Stun
summary: Overload a creature's mind with a single command that can leave it stunned on the spot.
effect: Stun a creature with 150 Hit Points or fewer or reduce its Speed to 0 until your next turn

name: Sunburst
summary: Detonate a sphere of blazing sunlight that burns foes, blinds them, and strips away magical darkness.
effect: Flash brilliant sunlight in a 60-foot-radius sphere to deal 12d6 Radiant damage, blind creatures, and dispel magical darkness

name: Antipathy/Sympathy
summary: Bind a creature type to recoil from or gravitate toward a target for days at a time.
effect: Ward a Huge or smaller target so a chosen creature type is drawn toward it or repelled from it within 120 feet

name: Befuddlement
summary: Shatter a creature's mind with psychic force and potentially lock out its spellcasting for weeks.
effect: Blast a creature for 10d12 Psychic damage and potentially block spellcasting and Magic actions until it recovers

name: Clone
summary: Grow a dormant duplicate body that can receive a creature's soul after death.
effect: Create an inert duplicate that matures over 120 days and can house the original creature's returning soul

name: Demiplane
summary: Open a shadowy doorway to a private extradimensional room you can revisit on later castings.
effect: Create a shadowy door to an empty demiplane and reconnect to demiplanes from prior castings

name: Glibness
summary: Turn every Charisma check into a polished performance and foil magic that tests your honesty.
effect: Treat Charisma checks as at least 15 and appear truthful to magic that tests your words

name: Mind Blank
summary: Shield a creature from psychic harm, charm, remote sensing, and magical attempts to read or control the mind.
effect: Grant psychic and charm immunity while blocking emotion sensing, thought reading, magical location, and mind control

name: Tsunami
summary: Raise a colossal moving wall of water that batters creatures and sweeps them along as it collapses.
effect: Create a massive advancing wall of water that deals Bludgeoning damage and drags creatures through its path

name: Astral Projection
summary: Project yourself and willing allies into the Astral Plane while your bodies remain behind in suspended animation.
effect: Project yourself and up to eight willing creatures into the Astral Plane while your bodies remain in suspended animation until the spell ends

name: Foresight
summary: Grant a creature a glimpse of the immediate future so it acts with near-perfect awareness for hours.
effect: Grant a willing creature Advantage on D20 Tests while other creatures have Disadvantage on attack rolls against it

name: Gate
summary: Tear open a portal to another plane or drag a named extraplanar creature through to your side.
effect: Open a portal to a precise location on another plane or pull a named creature through from another plane

name: Imprisonment
summary: Seal a creature into a chosen magical prison that can last until a specific trigger ends it.
effect: Trap a creature in one of several magical prisons until a specified trigger or a level 9 Dispel Magic ends the spell

name: Mass Heal
summary: Release an overwhelming surge of restorative energy that can heal an entire group at once.
effect: Restore up to 700 Hit Points divided among creatures you can see and remove blinded, deafened, and poisoned

name: Meteor Swarm
summary: Call down a catastrophic rain of blazing meteors that devastates a huge area from extreme range.
effect: Rain four meteors onto distant points, dealing massive Fire and Bludgeoning damage in huge overlapping spheres

name: Power Word Heal
summary: Speak a word of supreme restoration that instantly returns a creature to peak fighting condition.
effect: Fully restore one creature?s Hit Points and end several major conditions with a single word

name: Power Word Kill
summary: Utter a final command that slays the weak outright and still crushes stronger minds with psychic force.
effect: Kill a creature with 100 Hit Points or fewer or deal 12d12 Psychic damage instead

name: Prismatic Wall
summary: Raise a layered rainbow barrier that blinds nearby creatures and punishes anything passing through it.
effect: Create a seven-layer wall or globe of light that blinds nearby creatures and imposes different effects by color

name: Shapechange
summary: Take on the form of immensely powerful creatures while keeping your own mind and magical aptitude.
effect: Assume powerful creature forms of CR no higher than your level or Challenge Rating while keeping your own mind and spellcasting

name: Storm of Vengeance
summary: Summon a vast supernatural storm that escalates through thunder, acid, lightning, hail, and freezing winds.
effect: Unleash a 300-foot-radius storm cloud that escalates through thunder, acid, lightning, hail, and freezing winds over multiple turns

name: Time Stop
summary: Freeze the world around you long enough to take several turns before anyone else can react.
effect: Take 1d4 + 1 turns in a row while time is stopped for everyone else unless you affect another creature

name: True Polymorph
summary: Transform creatures or objects into entirely new forms, potentially making the change permanent.
effect: Transform a creature or object into another form, potentially permanently if you maintain Concentration for the full duration

name: True Resurrection
summary: Restore a long-dead creature completely, even providing a new body if the original is gone.
effect: Return a creature dead up to 200 years to life with all Hit Points restored and a new body if needed

name: Weird
summary: Overwhelm multiple creatures with psychic nightmares that terrify them and grind them down.
effect: Frighten creatures in a large sphere with psychic terrors that keep dealing Psychic damage on failed saves

name: Wish
summary: Bend reality to duplicate lower-level magic or attempt nearly any effect at enormous personal risk.
effect: Duplicate lower-level spells or attempt to reshape reality itself at severe personal cost
